\tzpentry{ID5084}{Partial Eigenvalue}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5084 introduces Partial Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\n\\frac{\\partial n(x,t)}{\\partial t} = \\lambda(x,t)\\,,\n$$
